[30;1m462 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m463 | [0m[35m### Plaintext Storage of Credentials[0m
[30;1m464 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m465 | [0m[35mThe **Hawk** key functions the same way passwords do in traditional authentication systems. In order[0m
[30;1m466 | [0m[35mthe server must have access to the key in plaintext form. This is in contrast, for example, to moder[0m
[30;1m467 | [0m[35mstore only a one-way hash of user credentials.[0m
[30;1m468 | [0m[35m[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m186[0m[34m of [0m[33m2033[0m[31m ]--[0m

[30;1m51 | [0m[35mreplay attacks, in **Hawk** the client generates the nonce and uses it in combination with a timesta[0m
[30;1m52 | [0m[35m"chattiness" (interaction with the server).[0m
[30;1m53 | [0m[35m[0m

[30;1m56 | [0m[35m[0m

[30;1m43 | [0m[35mand optionally the request payload.[0m
[30;1m44 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m45 | [0m[35mSimilar to the HTTP [Digest access authentication schemes](http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2617.txt), **H[0m
[30;1m46 | [0m[35mclient credentials which include an identifier (e.g. username) and key (e.g. password). Likewise, ju[0m
[30;1m47 | [0m[35mthe key is never included in authenticated requests. Instead, it is used to calculate a request MAC [0m
[30;1m48 | [0m[35mincluded in its place.[0m
[30;1m49 | [0m[35m[0m

[30;1m137 | [0m[35mfunctions ensure that starting at \fIoffset\fR does not overflow the end of the[0m
[30;1m138 | [0m[35mbuffer. The argument \fIvalue\fR is a Number that is the valid type for the[0m
[30;1m139 | [0m[35mspecific function. All functions that take \fIvalue\fR as an argument, verify[0m
[30;1m140 | [0m[35mthat the passed value is valid.[0m

[30;1m203 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m204 | [0m[35m## Clock Skew[0m
[30;1m205 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m206 | [0m[35mAs the default scheme is to sign the `Date` header, service providers SHOULD[0m
[30;1m207 | [0m[35mprotect against logged replay attacks by enforcing a clock skew.  The server[0m
[30;1m208 | [0m[35mSHOULD be synchronized with NTP, and the recommendation in this specification[0m
[30;1m209 | [0m[35mis to allow 300s of clock skew (in either direction).[0m

[30;1m64 | [0m[35m#### keyId[0m
[30;1m65 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m66 | [0m[35mREQUIRED.  The `keyId` field is an opaque string that the server can use to look[0m
[30;1m67 | [0m[35mup the component they need to validate the signature.  It could be an SSH key[0m
[30;1m68 | [0m[35mfingerprint, an LDAP DN, etc.  Management of keys and assignment of `keyId` is[0m
[30;1m69 | [0m[35mout of scope for this document.[0m

[30;1m26 | [0m[35minfrastructure that may not make sense to a service provider (e.g., symmetric[0m
[30;1m27 | [0m[35mkeys).[0m
[30;1m28 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m29 | [0m[35mSeveral web service providers have invented their own schemes for signing[0m
[30;1m30 | [0m[35mHTTP requests, but to date, none have been placed in the public domain as a[0m
[30;1m31 | [0m[35mstandard.  This document serves that purpose.  There are no techniques in this[0m
[30;1m32 | [0m[35mproposal that are novel beyond previous art, however, this aims to be a simple[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m932[0m[34m of [0m[33m2033[0m[31m ]--[0m

[30;1m23 | [0m[35mAdditionally, OAuth provides a fully-specified alternative for authorization[0m

[30;1m51 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m52 | [0m[35mHowever, delayed-stream still continues to emit all events it captures on the[0m
[30;1m53 | [0m[35m`source`, regardless of whether you have released the delayed stream yet or[0m

[30;1m462 | [0m[35m* arr - An array to iterate over.[0m
[30;1m463 | [0m[35m* iterator(item, callback) - A function to apply to each item in the array.[0m
[30;1m464 | [0m[35m  The iterator is passed a callback(err, sortValue) which must be called once it[0m
[30;1m465 | [0m[35m  has completed with an error (which can be null) and a value to use as the sort[0m
[30;1m466 | [0m[35m  criteria.[0m
[30;1m467 | [0m[35m* callback(err, results) - A callback which is called after all the iterator[0m
[30;1m468 | [0m[35m  functions have finished, or an error has occurred. Results is the items from[0m
[30;1m469 | [0m[35m  the original array sorted by the values returned by the iterator calls.[0m
